source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for compact creator UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, dense toolbars, readable dashboard numbers, and crisp publishing workflows.
layout: 8px grid, compact panels, 8px maximum radius, nectar-pill controls, feather-scale dividers, tight creator toolbars, and dashboard-first publishing surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent sunbird throat motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Sunbird transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated sunbird throat motif on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined tropical sunbird throat motif, compact and jewel-like: iridescent metallic violet throat patch shifting into emerald green, small curved nectar-feeding bill silhouette, golden yellow breast flare, fine feather microtexture, crisp compact cutout shape, premium creator-system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full throat patch, small bill accent, and yellow breast flare without cropping; no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving metallic violet, emerald green, sunlit yellow, and precise feather detail without casting any shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no tropical flower background, no other birds, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Sunbird" / "Sunbird" using the motif of an iridescent tropical sunbird throat.
Visual identity: compact creator system for creative tooling and publishing workflows, metallic violet throat surfaces, emerald green feather highlights, sunlit yellow nectar accents, deep black bill ink, warm tropical flower coral, clean pollen-white surfaces, precise editorial product-system polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, compact creator toolbars, small nectar-pill active states, feather scale dividers, white studio cards, metallic violet primary actions, emerald focus rings, yellow highlight chips, restrained flower-coral alerts, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Studio, Assets, Queue, Publish, Canvas, Status, Form, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Active, Pending.
Palette names visible: Pollen White #fffbed, Throat Violet #6d2cff, Emerald Sheen #00a66a, Nectar Yellow #ffd43b, Bill Ink #17151d, Flower Coral #ff6f61, Leaf Mist #d7f2df, Violet Wash #ece5ff, Green Foil #74d99f, Shadow Plum #241631.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon-only palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
